---
name: troubleshoot-adb
description: "Troubleshoot Android ADB connection and command issues for screen inspection workflows."
---

# Troubleshoot ADB

Diagnose ADB issues affecting scraping workflows.

## Checklist

1. Verify `adb version` and `adb devices` output.
2. Check serial targeting when multiple devices exist.
3. Validate UI dump and screenshot command behavior.
4. Capture stderr/exit codes and propose corrective steps.
